message:
feat(analytics): add analytics CLI subcommand tree + ftui runtime detection

Introduce the full `cass analytics` subcommand family (status, tokens,
tools, models, cost, rebuild, validate) with shared AnalyticsCommon
argument model for time-range, dimensional-filter, and output flags.
Each subcommand supports --group-by bucketing (hour/day/week/month)
and JSON output for robot-safe consumption.

Also adds TUI runtime selection logic: when CASS_TUI_RUNTIME=ftui (or
frankentui/1/true/yes), the new FrankenTUI backend is activated instead
of the legacy ratatui runtime. The `--once` flag forces legacy mode
since ftui batch execution isn't wired yet.

Additionally re-exports the ftui_adapter::Rect through ui::mod and adds
a stub import for the sqlite storage layer.

- New enum: AnalyticsBucketing (Hour, Day, Week, Month) with Display
- New struct: AnalyticsCommon (since, until, days, agent, workspace, source, json, data_dir)
- New enum variants: Commands::Analytics, RobotTopic::Analytics
- New function: parse_tui_runtime() with comprehensive unit tests
- Cargo.toml: add ftui-harness dev-dependency
- Cargo.lock: add ftui-harness + update windows-sys 0.52→0.59

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
